checked.designed: Layer 2 - atomic reserve_or_get (INSERT ... ON CONFLICT ... RETURNING)
concurrency regression test asserting exactly 1 charge
non-owner returns the ORIGINAL charge id

missing: The design's test contract requires asserting that every response body carries the SAME (original) charge id. The shipped test asserts the PSP saw exactly 1 charge, but does NOT assert that the non-owner request returns that same charge id to the client. A path that 1-charges but returns a 409/empty to the retry would still pass the current test while violating the 'retried request returns the original charge' constraint.
required_change: Extend test_concurrent_same_key_charges_once (or add a sibling test) to assert all 50 responses carry the identical charge id returned by the owner.
source: subagent-driven-development two-stage review (spec compliance FIRST); example catches a missing spec'd element
